calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-26-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-26-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Beldon Yee.
David Brillant, Esq. for Plaintiff: Gerda Kircher.
Plaintiff's Witness/Property Manager: Bruce Sandifer, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Recia Young.
Exhibit 1 - Three-day Notice-------------------ID/EVID
After hearing the tetimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Recia Young as follows:
Restitution and Possession of the property located at 1334 Van Ness Ave., #511, San Francisco.
Back-Rent and Damages $2,832.34
Costs $195.00, for a total of $3,027.34
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-21-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: DAVID BRILLANT FOR PLAINTIFF GERDA KIRCHER
NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT RECIA YOUNG

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR. TO PROCEED TO TRIAL

COMMISSIONER:SUE KAPLAN; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; NOT REPORTED (218)
